title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that gives AI agents fluency in tools, models, and databases used by researchers. It integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL, enabling researchers to move from genetic variant observation to DNA sequence design for lab testing in minutes.
